content.instruction: In pairs, choose ONE local campaign idea (water, litter, walking, energy, or school transport). List three key facts you already know.
prompts: Who is your audience (students, families, drivers)?
What action do you want them to take?
Which two English words from the unit will appear on the poster?

content.instruction: Use the poster builder. Keep language clear and polite. Include a slogan, three bullets, and a call to action.
Groups walk around and read two other posters. Write one compliment and one polite suggestion for each.
prompts: Which poster used the best comparative language?
